backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.86 — Generate no longer false-aborts on a large assembly that's simply slow (it now checks whether SolidWorks is actually working before giving up), and frontend diagnostics are funneled into the agent log.

cadBridge.changelog: Generate no longer gives up on a big assembly that is simply slow: before declaring a stall it checks whether SolidWorks is actually working (CPU/memory active) and only restarts if SolidWorks is truly idle or stuck for over 30 minutes. The stall-recovery close timeout was raised so it no longer false-fails while SolidWorks is busy, and frontend progress milestones are now written into the agent log for easier diagnosis of long runs.
